task_completion.description: Navigate to the Accounts DetailView layout in SuiteCRM Studio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser shows the SuiteCRM Studio interface with the Accounts module selected, specifically in the Layouts -> DetailView section.

task_completion.description: Add a new panel to the DetailView layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new panel container is visible in the layout builder area, typically added by dragging a 'New Panel' element from the toolbox.

task_completion.description: Rename the newly created panel to 'Financial Details'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties of the new panel are edited to set its label to 'Financial Details', or the panel header clearly displays 'Financial Details' in the layout builder.

task_completion.description: Add the 'Annual Revenue', 'Ticker Symbol', and 'Employees' fields to the new panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fields 'Annual Revenue', 'Ticker Symbol', and 'Employees' are placed inside the 'Financial Details' panel in the layout builder.

task_completion.description: Save and deploy the updated layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save & Deploy' button is clicked, or the interface shows the layout has been successfully saved and deployed.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM Studio GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SuiteCRM Studio web interface, rather than editing PHP layout files directly in a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window shows the genuine SuiteCRM application with standard navigation menus and layout builder elements.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the layout changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The layout changes are made using the standard drag-and-drop and property editing features of Studio, without the browser developer console or DOM inspector open to manipulate the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target panel label must be exactly 'Financial Details'. The fields to be added correspond to the internal system names 'annual_revenue', 'ticker_symbol', and 'employees', which are typically displayed as 'Annual Revenue', 'Ticker Symbol', and 'Employees' in the Studio interface.
